title: The Buffer: Communication-Processing Application for Neurodivergent Users
abstract: 85% complete, communication processing for neurodivergent users

body.text: The Buffer is a communication-processing application designed specifically for neurodivergent users to manage sensory overload and cognitive load in interpersonal interactions.

Neurodivergent individuals often experience challenges in processing social communications due to sensory sensitivities and cognitive differences. The Buffer provides real-time support to reduce overwhelm and improve communication effectiveness.
Testing phase with neurodivergent user group planned
The Buffer has applications in reducing anxiety, improving social interactions, and supporting independence for neurodivergent individuals in educational, workplace, and social settings.
